pr-evidence/vllm-layer-index-mapping/pr-.gpt55_review_summary: Reviewer found no provider correctness issue. The only finding was the draft PR evidence sidecar being incomplete; this update fills PR #312 identity and review outcome fields and validates the evidence.
what_changed: Mapped vLLM native provider registered KV cache tensors to Cachet payload layers by parsing vLLM layer indices from cache layer names, with fail-closed validation for unparseable or duplicate layer names.
pr-evidence/vllm-layer-index-mapping/pr-.why: Real vLLM runtimes do not guarantee that the kv_caches mapping arrives in model-layer order, and insertion-order based mapping can silently copy external document KV payloads into the wrong physical layer tensors on g5/g6 benchmarks.
